summary: Open-side graph full-generate adapter + measurement: LNTerm->graph_clean::Term conversion, route full clean generation, measure whole-payload byte + web_parity semantic outcomes (decision-support, no adoption)

result.gate:
All servers stopped, ports clear, all gates green. Here is the measurement summary.

---

**GRAPH FULL-GENERATE MEASUREMENT — round-12 (open-side, no adoption)**

**Re-sync (step 1):** round-12 changed only `generate.rs` (963→1050 lines: slack law `ceil(e/2)-1` any-position, `ftup` occupancy, relief charge `min(hd(q+1/3),C)`); the other 10 vendored files are byte-stable under `crate::`→`super::`. Build green; `cargo test -p tamarin-server` lib+routes green; workspace suite `generate_tests` 27; serializer roundtrip 12022/12022; allocator 12022/12022; tripwire 0 stale (generate.rs headerless).

**Adapter design (3 sentences):** The adapter reconstructs a full `generate::System` from each captured HS DOT payload — records become `RawRule`s carrying dewrapped flat premise/info/conclusion cells plus role/cluster/colors, every non-record node becomes a `GraphNode::Shaped{label,shape,color}` (byte-exact ellipse passthrough, since the payload exposes only final ellipse text, not its `(term,temporal)` decomposition), edges resolve through `EndRef` + the fixed `EdgeStyle` vocabulary, and the legend is carried as `legend_html`+`legend_edges`. It then drives the complete clean pipeline (id alloc → clustering → record re-wrap → legend → edges → `to_dot`), so allocation, clustering, record layout, legend, edges and serialization are all exercised. The only component not regenerated is abbreviation SELECTION (cells fed pre-abbreviated) — the standing `LNTerm→graph_clean::Term` blocker for AC/DH/multiset — so the corpus surface measures everything except which sub-terms get abbreviated.

**Byte metric (12022 payloads):** whole-payload byte-exact **477/12022 = 3.97%**. This is NOT a layout regression: NON-edge byte-exact (node/record/cluster/legend/header) = **7865/12022 = 65.42%**, i.e. the SAME fill ceiling round-11 measured with structure reused (63.28%). Clean-expressible subset (no structural gap): 526 payloads, 90.68% byte-exact. The collapse is two edge-structural clean-model gaps that whole-graph regeneration exposes (cell-layout-only routing reused reference edges and never hit them).

**Semantic metric (web_normalize.canon_dot):** **45.82%** as-is → **75.70%** with a trivial 3-style edge-vocab gap closed → **91.73%** bracket-whitespace-normalized diagnostic. Clean-expressible subset 95.25%.

**Ranked byte families:** (1) **info-port edge — 11298 payloads (94%), 56990 edges**: `EndRef` has no info-port anchor, so HS `n131:n128 -> n4` becomes clean `n131 -> n4` (witness 00082e1d6a47b5af.dot); byte-affecting, semantically benign. (2) **unknown edge-style — 4345 payloads**: `EdgeStyle` covers 8 of 11 styles, missing `purple/dashed`, `dotted/green`, `darkorange3/dashed` → edge dropped. (3) **cell fill/wrap — 49** (the round-12 non-closed-form residual; witness 026cdfc052c875aa.dot, break after `KD1,` vs `KD2,`).

**Ranked semantic families:** (1) **dropped-edge (unknown edge-style) — 4345 payloads, 0% as-is** → 99.49% once the 3 variants exist (witness 01c5db0a7030e664.dot). (2) **fill-break-adjacent-to-bracket — ~2168 payloads**: a wrong break beside `\<`/`\>`/`(`/`)` shifts a space across the bracket (`~SUPI\> )` vs `~SUPI \>)`), surviving `\l`→space collapse; scales with payload size (witnesses 0011f263c0d9579a.dot, 0571c51f20849877.dot); cosmetic under a bracket-aware normalizer.

**Dialect (measured explicitly):** the clean serializer emits the HS dialect (`digraph "G" {`, quoted attrs, blank line before `}`), so the byte metric is a DIRECT byte comparison. The TREE serves a different, compact viz.js dialect (`digraph G {`, unquoted, 2-space indent, `shape=record` in node defaults) — live RS-vs-HS = **byte 0/100, semantic 100/100**.

**Live surface (step 4, ports 3210/3201):** 100 live HS-served DOT payloads over 3 theories; full-clean-gen vs HS semantic **76/100 = 76.0%** (Tutorial 36/36 100%, NAXOS_eCK 36/60 60%, issue193 4/4 100%) — same info-port + unknown-edge-style + fill families as the corpus; RS(tree) vs HS byte 0/100, semantic 100/100.

**Regression (step 5):** `cargo test --workspace` **1195/0**; `JOBS=6 wf_gate.sh` **419 MATCH / 0 DIFF / 0 SKIP**; header check **0 stale**, graph_clean headerless; header delta 133→133. Nothing routed; all serving paths byte-unchanged; servers stopped; OOM guards preserved.

**What SEMANTIC adoption would REQUIRE:** (1) 3 new `EdgeStyle` variants (mechanical; 45.82%→75.70%, also needed for byte); (2) an info-port `EndRef` anchor (byte-required at 94% of payloads; semantically alre
